response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the first song "怪獣の花唄" by Vaundy via on-screen text.
2. Performed a search for lyrics using: '"怪獣の花唄" Vaundy Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. Identified the second song "初恋サイダー" by Buono! via on-screen text.
4. Performed a search for lyrics using: '"初恋サイダー" Buono! Japanese and English lyrics'.
5. Divided the video into scenes based on the song changes and the intermission.
response.global_summary: A video of a karaoke session by multiple VTubers featuring two songs: '怪獣の花唄' (Kaiju no Hanauta) by Vaundy and '初恋サイダー' (Hatsukoi Cider) by Buono!, with an intermission between them.

scenes.description: VTubers performing '怪獣の花唄' (Kaiju no Hanauta) in a karaoke setting. Text '怪獣の花唄' appears on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
思い出すのは君の歌
会話よりも鮮明だ
どこに行ってしまったの
いつも探すんだよ
思い出すのは君の歌
歌い笑う顔が鮮明だ
君に似合うんだよ
ずっと見ていたいよ
でも最後に見たいのは
きっともう君の夢の中
もう一度
また聞かせて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I remember your song
It's clearer than conversation
Where have you gone?
I'm always looking for you
I remember your song
Your face as you sing and smile is so clear
It suits you so well
I want to keep looking at you
But the last thing I want to see
Is already in your dream, I bet
One more time, let me hear it again

scenes.description: Intermission featuring dialogue between the VTubers.
VTubers performing '初恋サイダー' (Hatsukoi Cider) in a karaoke setting. Text '初恋サイダー' appears on-screen.
